# render-contributions

Contributes a `Contributions.FacetTable` tab to the Studio Contributions view showing all
resources aggregated across plugins, one row per `defineResource` with key,
mode, runtime (server/central), and owning plugin columns. Reads
`node.facets["resources"]` for every plugin.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Aggregated cross-plugin resources table in the Studio Contributions view.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Contributions.FacetTable` "Resources"
  - Uses: `plugin-meta/contributions-table.Contributions`, `plugin-meta/contributions-table.defineFacetTable`, `plugin-meta/contributions-table.FacetTableEntry`, `plugin-meta/contributions-table.PluginChip`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
